Judge, this is TOC, do you read? Suspects have been blocking and hijacking our comms, and we're still trying to get around it. We can barely override them long enough to hold. Can you confirm the visual on the IED? Is there anything indicating frequencies or signals?
Roger that ‘D' Platoon. Command may be able to scramble the signal remotely, without disrupting the ‘safe' signal protocol. Can you extract anything we can use?

Receiving the data... Data confirmed. We can inject a spoofed frequency remotely to disrupt their control, but if the device doesn't display its ‘safe' signal, it means the IED will default to detonation mode. Eyes sharp then. Once activated, you'll only have a small window of time to neutralise the suspect with the detonator and disarm the bomb.
Not long, the protocol limit is short, might only buy you two minutes, three at most. Make it count. Your mission objective is now updated: secure the detonator and dis-.
